title: Formula 1 in a Nutshell
description:
WE ARE BACK, join the patreon! https://www.patreon.com/c/rickf1
Aston Martin rant is coming soon

Formula 1 is a motorsport I've explained for many years now, but never about how its actually experienced. Also, the best way I can describe it after years of study...F1 is where cars go in circles that are on crack and everyone loves it because cars go vroom.
